progress_summary: One-pass auditor sweep over the files touched by PRs #143, #146, #148, #151 (mobile workbench, mobile architecture diagram, welcome popup, full-bleed UI, top-right feedback pill, skill TOC restyle + click-to-flash, PostHog reverse-proxy). 16 findings reported, overall grade B+. The two CRITICAL severities flagged by the subagent (F-001 XSS via innerHTML on demo.astro, F-002 CSRF on /api/feedback) appear to be false positives on inspection — the innerHTML source is server-rendered Astro markup, and the feedback endpoint is same-origin with custom JSON content type. Real, actionable findings: F-005 (no prefers-reduced-motion guard on WelcomePopup), F-006 (close-button contrast in light mode), F-011 (Desktop/Mobile workbench duplication), and LHCI-1 (dark-mode pressed-pill contrast on /skills, Pill.astro). LHCI-1 was fixed and shipped in PR #155 (squash-merged as 75b6f82) — promoted the Pill.astro line-50 light-mode `color: var(--text)` override to apply in both themes, post-merge LHCI a11y on /skills jumped 0.96 → 1.00.

progress_table.label: Quality sweep — duplication, dead code, types
UX/a11y sweep — contrast, motion, focus, taps

key_decisions: Auditor mode only — no Fixer/Verifier this round (user did not request fix-all).
Subagent-delegated sweep due to ~8k LOC scope; auditor verified the two CRITICAL claims by reading the cited lines and downgraded both as likely false positives.

LHCI surfaced a real dark-mode contrast issue on .pill[aria-pressed=true] in Pill.astro — the existing B-10 override only fixes light mode (line 50). Dark-mode pressed-pill text is ~4.0:1 on the alpha-blended accent-dim surface, just under AA 4.5:1 for small text.
Default page theme is dark (Base.astro line 97), which is what LHCI audits.
user_preferences: Wants concrete findings with file:line, not generalities.
Comfortable triaging findings — doesn't need every CRITICAL fixed immediately if it's a low-likelihood false positive.

next_actions: F-011 (Desktop/Mobile workbench transcript duplication) is real tech debt — schedule for a refactor sprint, not a bug-fix branch.
Four HIGH findings remain after triage (F-005/F-006 fixed, F-001/F-002 false-positive, LHCI-1/2/3/4/5 fixed). Worth a sweep when the next session has time — none are blockers.

After the next LHCI run on /architecture and /skills/app-architect, verify the contrast scores cleared (LHCI-2 through LHCI-5). If app-architect's perf 0.90 on /architecture is still flagged, that's a separate investigation tied to the SVG diagram render cost — punted from this PR per user direction.

headline_findings.title: No prefers-reduced-motion guard on WelcomePopup transitions
headline_findings.fix: Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block disabling transition + transform on .welcome-scrim, .welcome-card, .welcome-btn.

headline_findings.title: Close-button contrast in light mode
headline_findings.fix: Added :global([data-theme="light"]) .welcome-close { color: var(--text); } — promotes muted gray to high-contrast text token in light theme.

headline_findings.title: Dark-mode pressed pill ~4.0:1 contrast on /skills filter
code[data-cmd] color (--ember) on alpha-pill bg ~4.22:1 — fails AA Normal at 12px
headline_findings.fix: Swapped color/border/background from var(--ember) to var(--workflow) (#FB923C / light: #8a3610). --workflow is the AA-calibrated bright-ember sibling already used for the workflow role; same visual family, clears AA on both themes.

headline_findings.title: Skill detail TOC links fail target-size (24×24)
headline_findings.fix: Bumped link padding from `padding-left: 0.55rem` to `padding: 4px 0 4px 0.55rem`. 14px×1.4 + 8px padding ≈ 28px, clears the 24px threshold without disrupting the fixed-position rail layout.

headline_findings.title: Architecture band-label-text + legend-section-label use --slag (~2.30:1) — fails AA Normal
headline_findings.fix: Swapped color from var(--slag) (#5a5040) to var(--subtle) (#9d8b78), the calibrated dimmed-text token (5.06–5.42:1 across canonical surfaces). Active band still brightens to var(--sand) so the dim/active hierarchy is preserved.

headline_findings.title: Architecture card spans + spine swatch use legacy teal #0D9488 (~4.48:1) — fails AA Normal at small sizes
headline_findings.fix: Swapped #0D9488 → #14B8A6 (matches global --specialist token after B-10 calibration). Three card span colors and the spine swatch (border + color + bg-mix). Other instances of #0D9488 in SVG text remain — Lighthouse doesn't audit SVG text contrast and these aren't flagged.

skill_state.depends_on: checkpoint-protocol v1.0; reads ux-engineer + app-architect checkpoints for context
